page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: FGSM398 or HNUH398P.

HNUH398T Global Health Challenges and Water Security (3 Credits) An examination of questions and issues of global health and water security. Expert practitioners will also visit class and participate in discussions.

Cross-listed with: FGSM390.

Restriction: Must be in the Global Fellows Program; and permission of instructor.

Credit Only Granted for. HNUH398T, HONR378M, or FGSM390.
